Name: TALK_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters for character dialogues.

Fields.Name: Message ID
Fields.Description: The text ID for the message this line of dialogue should display as subtitles.

Fields.Name: Voice ID
Fields.Description: The voice ID for this line of dialogue.

Fields.Name: Motion ID
Fields.Description: The animation the character speaking this line of dialogue should use during playback.

Fields.Name: Return: Conversation Position
Fields.Description: The relative position of conversation to return when returning to a conversation.

Fields.Name: Return: Reaction ID
Fields.Description: The reaction ID to use when returning to a conversation.

Fields.Name: Return: Event ID
Fields.Description: The event ID to use when returning to a conversation.

Fields.Name: Is Motion Looped
Fields.Description: If ON, the motion animation is looped for this line of dialogue.
